prestazioni: F136FB 4.5L V8 naturally aspirated engine (90° flat-plane crank, 12.5:1 compression) upgraded with a Novitec Rosso Power Kit Stage 3, including custom CNC-ported cylinder heads, titanium intake valves, and a bespoke ECU remap targeting 680 HP at 9,500 RPM with a 9,200 RPM redline (factory: 562 HP at 9,000 RPM).

Full titanium exhaust system by Capristo, featuring 200-cell metallic catalytic converters, Inconel headers, and a bypass valve system for track-only straight-pipe mode, reducing weight by 18 kg and increasing exhaust flow efficiency by 22%.

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with Eibach ERS race springs (front: 200 N/mm, rear: 220 N/mm) and spherical bearing top mounts for sub-2.0s Nürburgring Nordschleife lap times.
estetica: Novitec Rosso N-Largo widebody kit, extending front fenders by 60mm and rear fenders by 80mm to accommodate 20x10.5 ET35 (front) and 21x12.5 ET40 (rear) HRE FF01 wheels with Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear).

Custom carbon fiber front splitter by Vorsteiner, designed with a 3D-scanned Ferrari 458 Italia chassis for perfect fitment, featuring integrated air curtains and a 45mm adjustable dive plane for +120 kg of downforce at 200 km/h.

Rear diffuser by Mansory, constructed from pre-preg carbon fiber with active Gurney flaps (electrically adjustable via a cockpit switch) and integrated titanium exhaust outlets, reducing drag coefficient by 0.03 Cd while increasing rear downforce by 18%.
